parsed_review.summary: CP00-618 (Risk B, 40 units, RP20.P02.M07.S13-RP20.P02.M09.S08) is a clean descriptor-only closeout pack for the Data Room/VDR P02 Test And Golden Case Set tail, full Hermes Evidence Packet, and Claude Review Packet head. Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms: (1) pack identity, range, section row counts M07(10)+M08(22)+M09(8)=40, and deliverable distribution {implementation:16, claude_review:2, ui:4, failure_recovery:4, test:8, contract:2, security_audit:4} are internally consistent across registry.js, manifest.json, review-baseline.json, and the contract, and the title-derived deliverable classification reproduces the manifest counts exactly; (2) no-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced in freezeCp618Result and asserted by validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp618P02TestHermesClaudeBridgeDescriptor (~40 boolean boundary assertions) with no fs/child_process/net/http/fetch/env usage anywhere in packages/data-room/src; (3) Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver (authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false, read_only=true, allowed_tools=Read,Grep,Glob, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true); (4) Hermes patterns are descriptor/receipt-only (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, executes_hermes_evidence_packet_runtime=false); (5) tests (model.test.js), the validator script, README#cp00-618, and the contract projections are present and mutually consistent. The pack honestly reports production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, and pending_review — there is no over-claim, and the descriptor-level closeout flag (data_room_vdr_core_p02_test_hermes_claude_bridge_descriptor_verified) is fully supported. The readiness auth-preflight passed with valid non-empty JSON, and no invalid review evidence (auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, or missing required fields) is present. PASS with zero findings; production_ready/runtime gates remain closed pending human approval and are not weakened by this review.
